variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 4078 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 4078 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 4078 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.

variants.title: Mann Filter C 36 172 Air Filter | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 4078
variants.description: High-quality MANN-FILTER air filters for clean air intake and optimum protection for your engine, mass air flow sensor & other sensitive components / They meet requirements of modern engine technology. Highest dirt holding capacity and dirt separation efficiency, low flow resistance and high pleat stability ensure functional reliability during the entire service interval.

variants.title: Fleetguard AF27960 Air Filter Filter - Panel | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 4078
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF27960 panel cabin air filter provides clean air in the cab which means a clean work environment.  Breathing cleaner air can lead to longer and more productive working hours.
